Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, so uh, didn't Kirijo-senpai say we shouldn't be hanging out like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Think she'll be mad if she finds out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But I won't deny that seeing you all does remind me of recent events.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}R-Right! Well then, why don't we just call it a wrap here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Um, Sanada-senpai! I'd like to ask for some help with this question![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh, uh... Wait, Junpei-kun! I wanted to ask you, uh... Um...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I think I'll take Koromaru for a walk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Hey, wait! We'll all take him on a walk when we're done. You can sit back down, Amada-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, ahaha... I guess you found out. I was planning on inviting you too, Mitsuru-senpai...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I do understand that we don't have time for chitchat, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I just... wanted to spend time with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Um, this was actually my idea! I was the one who wanted to gather everyone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}So... I'm sorry. I don't want everyone to get in trouble for my selfishness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Hey, you shouldn't be the only one that has to apologize. I feel the same way, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Thanks, Yukari-chan. It's just... when I think this might be the last—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Um...! In any case, I apologize for this! Let's just call it for today![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}After warning you all, I wasn't sure how to go back on it. I was actually taking a walk to mull it over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}Yukari... Yamagishi... I feel the same way you do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Eh, you did say we should try to go about our lives for now. You hear that, Junpei? Let's get to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}If we're talkin' MY life, studying's the last thing I'd be doing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Mitsuru-senpai, could you help me with this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Heh, of course. What question did you need help with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We studied together as we always do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel I was able to focus[n]better than usual...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Whew, how long have we been studying? Time really flies when we're all in it together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I agree... Thank you for going along with my suggestion, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}You think so? I hope everyone else feels the same way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Hehe... Sure! If anyone has any requests, please let me know. That includes you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}By the way... I hope you haven't forgotten about taking Koromaru for a walk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Er— Of course not! C'mon, everyone, let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}That'll be it for studying, then. Everyone, make sure to give it your all on the exams.[n]{f 1 1}
